title: Appearance
description: Activate a theme and adjust the settings it declares.
denied: You do not have permission to view themes.
emptyDescription: This site has no theme installed yet.

settings.heading: Settings: {name}
settings.generated: This form is generated from the theme's settingsSchema.
settings.denied: You do not have permission to configure themes.

demo.availableHint: This active theme provides demo content. Seeding it will not touch your real content.
demo.seededHint: Demo content for this active theme has been seeded. You can reseed it safely.
demo.seeded: Seeded demo data: {content} content items and {menus} menus.
demo.denied: You do not have permission to seed theme demo data.

errors.activateDenied: You do not have permission to activate a theme.

sideload.heading: Install from file
sideload.hint: Upload a signed .zcms your operator produced. It is verified against the operator key, scanned, and held for approval before it can run.
sideload.uploaded: Uploaded {name} v{version}. It is quarantined until you approve it.
sideload.uploadFailed: The package could not be installed.
sideload.denied: You do not have permission to sideload packages.
sideload.actionFailed: That action could not be completed.
